metrics.name: stackra.coupon.count
metrics.description: Count of coupons per (is_active, discount_type, issuance_source). Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.slots_used
metrics.description: Percentage of `coupon_slot` entitlement consumed across all tenants. Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.redemption_refusals_total
metrics.description: Every refusal fires. Rate-limited enumeration attempts surface as refusal_reason='COUPON_NOT_FOUND' spikes.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.redemption_duration_ms
metrics.description: CouponRedeemer::redeem() duration including the SELECT FOR UPDATE row lock + insert + counter increment. P99 target < 200ms.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.clawbacks_total
metrics.description: Clawback events triggered by finance::RefundIssued / ChargebackFiled.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.bulk_issue_count_bucket
metrics.description: Bulk-issue count distribution — how many codes each bulk-issue produces.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.atomicity.failures_total
metrics.description: CRITICAL. CouponRedeemer transaction atomicity failures. Should stay at 0. failure_point: 'redemption_insert' / 'counter_increment' / 'row_lock_timeout' / 'unknown'.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.usage_count.drift_ratio
metrics.description: ReconcileUsageCountJob measures the drift between coupons.usage_count vs the recomputed COUNT(*) over non-reversed redemptions. Should stay 0. Any drift > 0 is a bug in the counter-increment path.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.rate_limit_hits_total
metrics.description: bucket_type: 'ip' / 'user'. Every 429 fire increments the appropriate bucket.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.preview_duration_ms
metrics.description: POST /coupons/{code}/preview + GET /coupons/validate/{code} HTTP latency. P99 target < 100ms.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: stackra.coupon.marketing_events_dispatched_total
metrics.description: How many marketing events fire per issuance_source. issuance_source: 'referral' / 'marketing_campaign' (others skip the marketing lane).
